summary: STAGEPASS Iteration 7 - All 40 tests passed. Verified all URGENT fixes in production ZIP: (1) Live Chat server API with GET/POST polling, (2) Butler 3-tier AI fallback, (3) HLS generation with worker/PubSub/Firestore fallback chain, (4) DJ handoff API, (5) LIVE_DJ mode in station/now, (6) Admin stats server-side API, (7) Deploy script with aiplatform + run.invoker + WORKER_SERVICE_URL.
passed_tests: Backend API: 13/13 preview portal tests passed (health, download, feed, auth, chat)
ZIP Content: 27/27 iteration 7 feature verification tests passed
Frontend: Home page loads with STAGEPASS PRODUCTION PACKAGE heading
Frontend: Navigation works - Feed, Dashboard, Radio, Live, Community tabs
ZIP FIX 1: Live Chat API at apps/web/src/app/api/live/chat/[channelId]/route.ts - GET/POST handlers with firebase-admin
ZIP FIX 1: LiveChat.tsx uses /api/live/chat polling (setInterval 3s), NO subscribeChat client SDK
ZIP FIX 2: Butler resolve route has 3-tier fallback: API key → ADC/Vertex AI → getFallbackResponse
ZIP FIX 2: Butler fallback handles keywords: live, upload, radio, analytics, help
ZIP FIX 3: generate-stream route calls worker with ID token auth from metadata.google.internal
ZIP FIX 3: generate-stream has PubSub fallback (publishMessage to stagepass-tasks)
ZIP FIX 3: generate-stream has Firestore queue fallback (streamStatus: QUEUED)
ZIP FIX 4: DJ handoff API at apps/web/src/app/api/radio/dj-handoff/route.ts - GET + POST (TAKE_OVER/RELEASE)
ZIP FIX 5: station/now/route.ts handles LIVE_DJ mode with DJ info (displayName, startedAt, liveStreamUrl)
ZIP FIX 6: Admin stats API at apps/web/src/app/api/admin/stats/route.ts - uses firebase-admin
ZIP FIX 6: Admin page uses /api/admin/stats endpoint, no client Firestore imports
ZIP FIX 7: deploy_fast.ps1 enables aiplatform.googleapis.com API
ZIP FIX 7: deploy_fast.ps1 grants roles/run.invoker to service account
ZIP FIX 7: deploy_fast.ps1 sets WORKER_SERVICE_URL env var in web deployment

features: Worker call with ID token from metadata.google.internal

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED APIs: Preview portal uses mock data (/api/feed returns hardcoded items, /api/auth/login only accepts demo credentials)
All iteration 7 URGENT fixes are correctly implemented in the production ZIP
seed_data_creation: None required - uses mock data in preview portal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified all URGENT fixes: (1) Live Chat now uses server-side API with polling instead of blocked client SDK, (2) Butler has 3-tier AI fallback (API key → ADC → rule-based), (3) HLS generation has 3-tier fallback (worker → PubSub → Firestore queue), (4) DJ handoff API for live takeover, (5) LIVE_DJ mode in now API, (6) Admin stats fully server-side, (7) Deploy script updated with aiplatform, run.invoker, WORKER_SERVICE_URL. All code verified via grep on extracted ZIP.
